caption:
This beach & the water is stunning, BUT 👇

📍Nissi Beach, Ayia Napa - Cyprus 🇨🇾

Nissi Beach is located on the outskirts of the famous tourist town of Ayia Napa and to be honest, I don’t think I’ve ever seen water this blue anywhere in Europe.   The main downside of the beach, however, is that it’s relatively small and incredibly crowded - even here in April, where there aren’t that many tourists compared to the high season in the summer months 🤥   Do visit Nissi Beach, but beware that it won’t be a relaxing beach day ✌️ 

For that, I’d recommend walking the 5-10 minutes around the bend to Vathia Gonia, which may not have the same blue water, but the water is still gorgeous and even a bit warmer than at Nissi 😎

Landa Beach, in the other direction from Nissi Beach, has a bit of the same vibe, so if you’re up for it, this is probably one of the best places in Europe to do a beach crawl 😀  What is the most beautiful beach you’ve ever been to? 🏖️  #nissibeach #bestbeaches #cyprus #traveltips
